sources.title: Businesses and organisations
sources.notes: Primary navigation source for Australian business tax and super obligations.

sources.title: Business activity statements (BAS)
sources.notes: Canonical starting point for BAS preparation, lodgment, payment, and corrections.

sources.title: Pay as you go (PAYG) withholding
sources.notes: Reporting and payment guidance for amounts withheld from workers and other payees.

sources.title: Code of Professional Conduct
sources.notes: Core professional obligations for registered tax and BAS agents; high-risk source.

sources.title: BAS agent registration
sources.notes: Use to distinguish registered-practitioner work from general bookkeeping assistance.

sources.title: AASB Standards Portal
sources.notes: Canonical source for current Australian Accounting Standards and applicable reporting periods.

sources.title: AUASB Standards Portal
sources.notes: Canonical source for Australian auditing, review, assurance, and related-services standards.

sources.title: Company annual review
sources.notes: Company annual statement, review fee, details check, and solvency-resolution workflow.

sources.title: Small proprietary companies
sources.notes: Use for entity-specific reporting and audit applicability; always requires human review.

sources.title: Record-keeping and pay slips fact sheet
sources.notes: Primary source for employment record and payslip requirements.

sources.authority: Office of the Australian Information Commissioner
sources.title: Australian Privacy Principles guidelines
sources.notes: Privacy baseline for client documents and personal information; applicability must be assessed.

sources.title: Update to regulator statement of expectations – May 2026
sources.notes: Fast-changing 2026 implementation area. Do not automate conclusions without current specialist review.
